B1_plain_roberta.description: Plain RoBERTa — [CLS] head, no aspect awareness, CE loss

B2_roberta_ce.description: RoBERTa + Aspect Attention + GCN + CrossEntropy (no hybrid loss)

B4_tfidf_svm.description: Classical TF-IDF + LinearSVC — no deep learning

A6_msr_with_gcn.description: MSR Eval: Full model + GCN (mixed sent resolution)

A6_msr_no_gcn.description: MSR Eval: No GCN (attention only, no dep parsing)
